chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-820 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 3639/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 3640/25 4.For hearing of main case 15-07-2025 Mr. Yaseen Ali Ghunio, Advocate for petitioner. ****** 1. Per office note, instant petition is already fixed on 13.08.2025; however, learned counsel pleads urgency on the ground that the case is fresh one and has not been noticed so far. He, therefore, submits that by granting this application, it may be converted into an application for antedating the case and matter may be taken up in Court today for hearing. Order accordingly. 2 to 4. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel does not wish to press instant petition; however, seeks permission to approach the respondents by filing certain applications/proposal, as the case may be. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
